title: Forearm laceration - conduit edge
description: Worker sustained 2-inch laceration on left forearm while cutting and deburring EMT conduit without sleeve protection. First aid applied. Four stitches at urgent care. Worker returned to work next day on restricted duty. Conduit deburring procedure updated.

title: Slip on icy walkway near miss
description: Worker slipped on un-salted exterior walkway at 6:45 AM before ice melt application. Caught themselves on handrail - no injury. Corrective action: site supervisor to verify all walking surfaces treated before first worker arrival when temperatures below 35 F. Pre-task safety check added.

title: Eye irritation - concrete dust
description: Concrete finisher reported eye irritation during Level 26 slab pour. Wind shifted and concrete dust contacted eyes. Irrigated with eye wash station. Returned to work with safety glasses plus face shield protocol for all pours when wind exceeds 10 mph.

title: Uncontrolled swing load near miss
description: Crane operator made blind pick of structural steel beam at Level 3 west wing. Beam shifted and swung 4 feet toward workers in drop zone. No contact. Workers in drop zone had not received hand signal from rigger. Revised lift plan implemented. All future critical lifts require dedicated signal person.

title: Roofing slip near miss
description: Roofer slipped on frost-covered TPO membrane surface at 6:30 AM on Building 2 roof. Worker caught on safety anchor - no fall. TPO walk-pad installation made mandatory on all frost risk days. Weather briefings added to morning tailgate.
